weeks.summary: Big week with Chipotle fundraiser tonight (Mar 4), ASP registration closing Sunday Mar 8, Ice Skating Night on Mar 13, PTA meeting Mar 11, Career Week Mar 17-20, and Read Across America dress-up week happening now (Mar 2-6).

events.title: Chipotle Fundraiser Night
events.details: Dine at Chipotle tonight - portion of sales goes to PTA.

events.title: Read Across America Dress-Up Week
events.details: Mon: Dress as favorite book character. Tue: Bring a stuffie to read with. Wed: Jaguar Day - school gear/colors/animal print. Thu: PJ Day - snuggle up with a good book. Fri: Dress as favorite animal or athlete (Non-fiction Day).

events.title: After School Program (ASP) Registration Deadline
events.details: Spring ASP registration closes. Classes still available: Magic of Mindfulness (Wed, Gr 3-5), World Cup Warmup (Thu, Gr 3-5), Arts & Crafts, Lego Club, Beyblade Battle, Junk Journaling, Adventure Camp, Yoga, Word Wizards. Register at bit.ly/aspstcloud or homeroom.com. Email: asp@stcloudpta.org

events.title: PTA General Meeting
events.details: 8:00-9:00 PM ET via Zoom. Special guests: Liberty & Roosevelt principals discussing middle school transitions. Zoom link to follow via PTA newsletters.

events.title: Family Ice Skating Night
events.details: $5 per person at Codey Arena, 560 Northfield Avenue, 6:30-8:00 PM. Free skate rentals for PTA members. Register at bit.ly/stcloudskate26. Volunteers needed.

events.title: Career Week
events.details: Sign up at tinyurl.com/StCloudCareerWeek to participate/volunteer.

events.title: Family STEM Festival - Volunteers Needed
events.details: Grant-funded event. Need volunteers for logistics, outreach, hands-on STEM activities, donations/sponsors. Subcommittee planning via Zoom. Contact grants@stcloudpta.org

events.title: Diversity Council - Heritage Month Contributions
events.details: Seeking families with info to share for Women's History Month, Black History Month, Lunar New Year. Contact diversitycouncilstc@gmail.com

events.title: PTA Matching Gifts via Benevity
events.details: PTA accepts matching gifts through Benevity. Check with employer to double your donation. PTA TIN: 51-0224833

events.title: PTA Membership
events.details: $15 membership supports volunteer opportunities, cultural enrichment, community events, school assemblies, teacher appreciation, school improvements. Join at bit.ly/scpta2526 or email membership@stcloudpta.org
